Sign in, sign out, inspect or rotate the token used by pura CLI.

Usage:
  pura auth [command]

Available Commands:
  login       Sign in via device flow
  logout      Sign out — wipe stored credentials for this profile
  refresh     Rotate the stored token
  status      Show current auth state
  token       Print the stored token (use with care)

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for auth

Global Flags:
      --api-url string   Override API endpoint
      --handle string    User handle (accepts alice or @alice; defaults to _)
      --jq string        Filter JSON output with jq expression
      --json             Force JSON output
      --profile string   Use named profile
      --quiet            Raw data only (no envelope)
      --token string     Override stored token
  -v, --verbose          Verbose output

Use "pura auth [command] --help" for more information about a command.
